description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a prominent gable roof and an attached garage. The main structure is surrounded by a paved driveway, a wooden deck area, and a backyard with a swimming pool. The front yard is lined with several trees, providing a natural barrier along the property edge. Large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored siding and darker roofing materials, with a visible porch area at the entrance. The overall design is modern yet retains classic bungalow proportions, making it suitable for suburban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, attached garage, front porch, backyard pool, and tree-lined driveway. The exterior features light siding, large windows, and a wooden deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, attached garage, front porch, and a row of trees along the left side.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full property layout, including the house, garage, driveway, tree line, and backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, wooden deck, swimming pool, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the length of the property, the row of trees, and the relationship between the house and garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
